title: sphenopholis obtusata subsp. lobata
intro: Sphenopholis obtusata subsp. lobata, also known as the Lobed Sphenopholis, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Sphenopholis obtusata subsp. lobata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
